summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: 20 pendulums hanging from a horizontal GREY support bar, each with length linearly increasing L ∈ [1.4, 3.5] m so ω_i = √(g/L_i) differ. ValueTracker t_tr advances time 0→30s; always_redraw pendulum rods + BLUE→YELLOW colored bobs phase-shifted per pendulum produce a snake-like traveling wave.
